title: T-040 — Shift end sign-off Server Action with V-PROD-SHIFT-002 unresolved-gates check
prompt:
# T-040 — Shift end sign-off Server Action

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-08-08, V-PROD-SHIFT-002

## Goal
Implement signOffShift Server Action verifying all unresolved gates before allowing shift transition to COMPLETED, computing final shift KPIs and emitting shift.ended outbox event.

## Implementation contract
Server Action signOffShift({shift_id, signer_user_id, pin}) in apps/web/app/(production)/shifts/actions.ts. Verifies signer role='shift_lead' and pin via 02-SETTINGS PIN infra. Runs gate checklist: (a) all WOs on this shift completed or pending COMPLETE override, (b) all outputs registered, (c) no open QA holds, (d) no open downtime_events on this shift, (e) handover note saved. If any gate red → 422 unresolved_gates {failed_gates:[...]}. On pass → INSERT shift_end_event row, compute KPI snapshot (yield, waste%, downtime min), enqueue outbox 'shift.ended' (placeholder log; actual outbox emit in T-041 wave). Return 200 {shift_id, signed_off_at, kpi_snapshot}.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/(production)/shifts/actions.ts [modify]
- packages/api-services/production/sign-off-shift.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(production)/shifts/__tests__/sign-off-shift.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given all gates green and valid PIN, when signOffShift, then 200 + signed_off_at + kpi_snapshot computed
2. Given open downtime_events on shift, when signOffShift, then 422 unresolved_gates with failed_gates listing 'open_downtime'
3. Given invalid PIN, when signOffShift, then 401 invalid_pin

## Test strategy
- RED: action test asserting happy + gate failure + pin failure before action exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test shifts.*sign-off'

## Risk red lines
- Do not let shift sign off with unresolved gates (V-PROD-SHIFT-002)
- Do not skip PIN verification (BRCGS digital signature §5.3)
- Do not allow non-Shift-Lead role to sign off

pipeline_inputs.description: signOffShift Server Action with V-PROD-SHIFT-002 gate checklist + PIN + KPI snapshot.
pipeline_inputs.details: Atomic gate checklist queries (5 checks). PIN verification via 02-SETTINGS infra. KPI snapshot stored on shift_end_event row. Shift Lead role required.
out_of_scope: Do not implement shift handover form (T-070)
Do not modify users PIN schema
acceptance_criteria: Given gates green + valid PIN, when signOffShift, then 200 + signed_off_at + kpi_snapshot
Given open downtime_events on shift, when signOffShift, then 422 unresolved_gates listing 'open_downtime'
Given invalid PIN, when signOffShift, then 401 invalid_pin
test_strategy: RED: action test asserting happy + gate failure + pin failure before action exists
risk_red_lines: Do not allow sign-off with unresolved gates
